rationale.bars: Opens with the ARCUS 12' family hero (Calvin smooth/neutral) followed by tambour variants light→dark (Ryann white → Tavion natural → Bevin gold → Levar black), then INOLA family (12' black hero + gold variant) and IRAJA convertible to complete the mega-wide modular block; next come extra-wide double/tasting bars (BOYCE, LOCKWOOD, BARCLAY); mid-width natural-wood bars flow light to medium (Canyon pine → Hampton oak → Beauregard tambour → Sinatra walnut) then the concrete-and-birch/split-wood tier (Wadsworth, Norwood, Boone, Woodsley) and the 72" concrete cousins (Walden, Elwood, Pickford, Durango); darker character bars close the standard block (Sidecar dark wood → Amisa midnight → Jepperd black tambour → Monroe black slat → Malvina oval outlier); the two tall trunk bars (Excursion champagne → Voyage black) follow as a narrow-silhouette pair; bar carts land last, glam-light to dark (Lucille gold → Marceline gold → Malcolm neutral → Evangeline silver).
rationale.cocktail-tables: Wide-diameter round tops lead (Elise 40"Ø mahogany → Duke 32"Ø bronze), flowing into square-section columns by size (Nantucket 24" oak → Timon 23.5" wood), then slim tall columns tonal-light to reflective (Bartolo black tambour → Farrow square slim → Toshia mirror), with the petite low limestone Relic as the outlier closer.
rationale.community-tables: JETT hero (94"W brass+wood) leads its family variant JETT MINI (60"W) immediately behind, then Scout (natural wood, widest) bridges to Broadway concrete (industrial tone) for a warm-to-cool tonal close.
rationale.stools: Tall bar-height stools open (Thatcher green woven 45"H → Axel 45"H), mid-height Vixxen (black, 42"H back) transitions tonally dark, then shorter counter stools close light-to-small (Farrell grey hide 30"H → Julien adjustable 27.5"H).
rationale.storage: Low wide console hero (Anathema 82" dark ash) anchors the block, followed by the tiered square shelving unit (Dezik) as an architectural outlier; wide open shelves progress light to warm (Berkshire oak → Therion mango → Ovalia brass); medium-height cabinet/shelf trio flows antique-light to acacia-natural (Beatrice → Salida → Rosa); the tall-dark tier closes with increasing height and material weight (Vespa dark wood 84"H → Cardea metal screen 72"H → Kalil black arcing metal 92.5"H).
